steps.input:
{"commands": ["python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
with ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as z:
    text=z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml').decode('utf-8')
    print(text[text.index('Upper bound sensitivity'):text.index('Budget sensitivity')])
PY", "python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as z:
    root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml'))
    for c in root.findall('.//a:c',ns):
        f=c.find('a:f',ns)
        if f is not None:
            v=c.find('a:v',ns)
            print(c.attrib['r'], f.text, v.text if v is not None else None)
PY"], "patch_file": "build_alarm_fatigue.py"}

python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as z:
    root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml'))
    for c in root.findall('.//a:c',ns):
        f=c.find('a:f',ns)
        if f is not None:
            v=c.find('a:v',ns)
            print(c.attrib['r'], f.text, v.text if v is not None else None)
PY

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
with ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as z:
    text=z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml').decode('utf-8')
    print(text[text.index('Upper bound sensitivity'):text.index('Budget sensitivity')])
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
ns={'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
with ZipFile('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]') as z:
    root=ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml'))
    for c in root.findall('.//a:c',ns):
        f=c.find('a:f',ns)
        if f is not None:
            v=c.find('a:v',ns)
            print(c.attrib['r'], f.text, v.text if v is not None else None)
PY

task: Advanced high-value task: Alarm Fatigue Workload Row High-Value Exception Triage. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for alarm fatigue workload row. Embedded packet: Records: R1 alarm_frequency=59 actionable_pct=91 response_time_s=2; R2 alarm_frequency=68 actionable_pct=87 response_time_s=5; R3 alarm_frequency=54 actionable_pct=102 response_time_s=1. Remediation options: O1 changes alarm_frequency by -12% cost=86000; O2 changes actionable_pct by -18% cost=101600; O3 changes response_time_s by -25% cost=60400; max_budget=127200. Rules and constraints: actionable<30 and frequency>20 is nuisance; response_time>20 is workload risk; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver alarm_fatigue_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
